name: rule_8a_auto_compliant
description: Rule 8a explicit-text short-circuit — procedures column (K) contains the literal phrase 'automatically compliant', which classify_row step 1 (rules.py:181-192, _R8A_TRIGGERS) matches as a Rule 8a trigger. The orchestrator returns Compliant BEFORE consulting the LLM. Empty stub queue confirms the LLM is not called. This case pins the explicit-text col-K lane of rule 8a; na_external_csp_rule_8b.json pins the complementary CSP-inheritance col-Q lane (also COMPLIANT_8A under v0.11.0, but matched from the human-authored rationale column, not the DISA template text). Together they cover both ways a row can auto-resolve to Compliant; if either short-circuit silently stops firing (trigger phrase typo, classify_row reordering, _find_first_trigger case sensitivity regression) the corresponding case fails immediately instead of surfacing as a precision drop weeks later.

ccis_row.guidance: The organization develops and documents an awareness and training policy.
ccis_row.procedures: This CCI is automatically compliant per the DoD-level awareness training program; no system-level test is required at the program tier.
